response: Austin, Texas-headquartered Acme Corp, which employs 342 workers, wrapped up its most recent fiscal year with a total annual revenue of $54.4 million, representing an 18% year-over-year growth. The company’s quarterly revenue shifted moderately across the 12-month period, coming in at $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and a year-high $16.2 million in Q4 to cap off its strong annual performance.
